text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, after Seiun Sky runs in a scrimmage...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, whaddya know? Looks like I won quite
spectacularly.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...To be honest, though, I really wasn't planning
on winning today.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I was just gonna give everyone the impression I
still needed time to get back in form.
choice_data_list: Then what made you pull ahead?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I wonder... You know, my legs just felt strangely
light while I was running.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I kept wondering why, and before I knew it, I
found myself in first place.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Looks like a certain trainer's been subtly bringing
out my potential.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yup! A terrific trainer and class coach—an
incredible instructor and a magnificent mentor!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well then, considering the effort I put into that
race, how's about we end practice early today?
choice_data_list: Hm... You look like you could go a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hoo boy. Guess this is what happens when I get
too good, huh?
